ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cell_types" (
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell type */,
  "dblabel" TEXT /* Cell type name to be used */,
  "dblabelEFO" TEXT /* Associated EFO term (if present) */,
  "EFO" TEXT /* Term ID (EFO if present, internal otherwise) */,
  "short_dblabel" TEXT /* Short name used for plotting */,
  "is_level" INTEGER /* Hierarchy level of the cell type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cell type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cell type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cell type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hierarchies" (
  "hierarchy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hierarchy */,
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell type the hierarchy belongs to */,
  "l4" TEXT /* Hierarchy level 4 */,
  "l4EFO" TEXT /* Hierarchy level 4 EFOID */,
  "l3" TEXT /* Hierarchy level 3 */,
  "l3EFO" TEXT /* Hierarchy level 3 EFOID */,
  "l2" TEXT /* Hierarchy level 2 */,
  "l2EFO" TEXT /* Hierarchy level 2 EFOID */,
  "l1" TEXT /* Hierarchy level 1 */,
  "l1EFO" TEXT /* Hierarchy level 1 EFOID */,
  "l0" TEXT /* Hierarchy level 0 */,
  "l0EFO" TEXT /* Hierarchy level 0 EFOID */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the hierarchy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hierarchy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hierarchies_cell_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_type_id") REFERENCES cell_types ("cell_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "EFO_terms" (
  "EFO_id" TEXT /* EFO ID */,
  "EFO_term" TEXT /* EFO term */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the EFO term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("EFO_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, curator, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell type being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the cell type */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the cell type was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_cell_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_type_id") REFERENCES cell_types ("cell_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "cell_type_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first cell type in the relationship */,
  "cell_type_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second cell type in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., is_a, part_of) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_cell_type_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("cell_type_id1") REFERENCES cell_types ("cell_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_cell_type_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("cell_type_id2") REFERENCES cell_types ("cell_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hierarchy_levels" (
  "hierarchy_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hierarchy level */,
  "hierarchy_level" TEXT /* Hierarchy level (e.g., l4, l3, l2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the hierarchy level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hierarchy_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_type_EFO_terms" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell type the EFO term is associated with */,
  "EFO_id" TEXT /* EFO ID of the term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_type_EFO_terms_cell_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_type_id") REFERENCES cell_types ("cell_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_type_EFO_terms_EFO_id FOREIGN KEY ("EFO_id") REFERENCES EFO_terms ("EFO_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_type_hierarchies" (
  "hierarchy_association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hierarchy association */,
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell type the hierarchy is associated with */,
  "hierarchy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hierarchy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hierarchy_association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_type_hierarchies_cell_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_type_id") REFERENCES cell_types ("cell_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_type_hierarchies_hierarchy_id FOREIGN KEY ("hierarchy_id") REFERENCES hierarchies ("hierarchy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell type the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_cell_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_type_id") REFERENCES cell_types ("cell_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell type the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_cell_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_type_id") REFERENCES cell_types ("cell_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload */,
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell type the upload is associated with */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the uploaded file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the uploaded file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_cell_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_type_id") REFERENCES cell_types ("cell_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell type the analytics record is associated with */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., views, edits) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the analytics record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_cell_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_type_id") REFERENCES cell_types ("cell_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell type the visualization is associated with */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., graph, chart) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data used to generate the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_cell_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_type_id") REFERENCES cell_types ("cell_type_id")
)
